name: Lagk-te-sa ("Cat's Tongues")
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together the butter and sugar until smooth.
2. Stir in vanilla extract and egg whites, beating well to combine.
3. Gradually mix in the sifted flour until a dough forms.
4. Press the dough through a wide round opening of a cookie press to form pencil-shaped cookies.
5. Place the cookies far apart on a sheet lined with parchment paper.
6. Bake at 400°F (200°C) for 7-8 minutes, checking closely to avoid burning.
End of recipe instructions
